description: Plays audio cues for Claude events

Notification.command: sh -c 'notif_type=$(jq -r ".notification_type // \"unknown\""); if [[ "$notif_type" == "idle_prompt" ]]; then (for i in 1 2 3; do afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Ping.aiff; done &>/dev/null &); elif [[ "$notif_type" == "permission_prompt" || "$notif_type" == "elicitation_dialog" ]]; then (afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Ping.aiff &>/dev/null &); fi'
